default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To set up and streamline Thiago's LinkedIn posting process using Assembly AI, including integration, approval workflow, and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Assembly AI will be used for managing Thiago's LinkedIn content, with a focus on LinkedIn over Twitter due to easier growth potential](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Thiago will receive Slack notifications for post approvals, streamlining the review process](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [The team will send questions in advance for the next biweekly meeting to gather content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [There's potential for incorporating video content in the future, as LinkedIn is prioritizing video posts](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

## Topics

### Assembly AI Setup and Integration

  - [Connected Thiago's LinkedIn account to Assembly AI](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [Set up Slack notifications for post approvals (preferred over email)](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Resolved initial connection issues related to different email addresses](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Demonstrated the approval process and user interface](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)

### Content Strategy and Posting Schedule

  - [Focus on LinkedIn as the primary platform due to easier growth potential](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Will cross-post to Twitter without additional optimization](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [Team will handle posting cadence, aiming for Monday through Friday schedule](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Content slates typically ready by Friday, with flexibility for timely posts](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)

### Approval and Posting Process

  - [Thiago receives Slack notifications for posts ready for approval](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [After approval, posts are automatically queued for scheduling](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Team manages optimal posting times throughout the week](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [First approved post scheduled for the following day](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)

### Future Content Ideas and Collaboration

  - [Team will send questions in advance of biweekly meetings for content brainstorming](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Considering video content for future posts, as LinkedIn favors video format](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [Potential series on upcoming 1000-person rollout as a use case](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
  - [Thiago can share ideas via Slack, voice memos, or directly in Assembly AI's ideas tab](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)

### Platform Comparisons and Features

  - [LinkedIn easier to grow on compared to Twitter](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [LinkedIn allows basic text formatting (bold, italics) but limited rich content options](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [Articles feature on LinkedIn can be valuable for longer-form content](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [Twitter growth requires more active engagement and time investment](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team to schedule and post the first approved content for tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [Prepare and send questions to Thiago in advance of the next biweekly meeting](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Explore potential for video content creation for future posts](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [Team to begin regular content creation and approval workflow](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Thiago to share ideas and content inspiration through various channels (Slack, voice memos, Assembly AI)](https://fathom.video/share/X2GyCVWzAgdHsfZEazRKvi6gSiHeW5Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)

action_items.description: Check Assembly approvals tab regularly for new content to review
Draft content for Thiago throughout week, ping for approvals
Schedule approved LinkedIn post for tomorrow
Prepare & send questions to Thiago in advance of next biweekly meeting
